headline: Trans Mountain and its federal parent see case for Ottawa owning pipeline for good
summary: There's a case to indefinitely keep the Trans Mountain pipeline in government hands, possibly alongside Indigenous partners, say the leaders of its operator and financial overseer.  It is a...

headline: AMZA jumped 158% in two years, but the math behind those $0.34 checks is fragile
summary: If you own the InfraCap MLP ETF (NYSEARCA:AMZA) for income, the question is simple: can the fund keep cutting those $0.34 monthly checks? AMZA pays a roughly 7.5% to 8% distribution yield from a concentrated, leveraged basket of energy midstream Master Limited Partnerships, and management just raised the monthly payout from $0.29 in 2025 to ... AMZA jumped 158% in two years, but the math behind those $0.34 checks is fragile

summary: By Robb M. Stewart Canada should be in no rush to offload the operator of the country's sole oil pipeline to the Pacific, the heads of Trans Mountain and its state owner say. The backdrop has...

headline: Suncor Energy Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Beat, Both Up Y/Y
summary: SU expects refinery throughput of 460,000-475,000 bbls/d, with utilization rates between 90% and 93%, and refined product sales in the range of 600,000-620,000 bbls/d.

raw.headline: Suncor Energy Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Beat, Both Up Y/Y
raw.summary: SU expects refinery throughput of 460,000-475,000 bbls/d, with utilization rates between 90% and 93%, and refined product sales in the range of 600,000-620,000 bbls/d.

headline: USA Compression Q1 Earnings Meet Estimates, Revenues Beat, Both Up Y/Y
summary: USAC expects its full-year 2026 adjusted EBITDA to be between $770 million and $800 million, and distributable cash flow to be between $480 million and $510 million.

raw.headline: USA Compression Q1 Earnings Meet Estimates, Revenues Beat, Both Up Y/Y
